# answer-mode: type
# answer-case: insensitive
#
# Manual test deck for Unicode text input (#5) and clipboard paste (#11).
# Each question shows the exact string to enter; copy the matching line from
# testdata/unicode-answers.txt and paste it with Ctrl+V (or middle-click).
# Cards cover: hiragana, kanji, Mandarin, accented Latin, German, Cyrillic,
# Greek, and an astral-plane emoji.

Card 1 — Japanese hiragana. Enter: こんにちは
---
こんにちは

Card 2 — Japanese. Enter: ありがとう
---
ありがとう

Card 3 — Mandarin. Enter: 你好
---
你好

Card 4 — Accented Latin. Enter: café
---
café

Card 5 — German. Enter: Grüße
---
Grüße

Card 6 — Cyrillic. Enter: спасибо
---
спасибо

Card 7 — Greek. Enter: ευχαριστώ
---
ευχαριστώ

Card 8 — Emoji (astral plane). Enter: 😀
---
😀
